title: American Cherry Cobbler
description: A classic American dessert featuring sweet cherries topped with a crumbly biscuit crust.

ingredients.name: fluffy
ingredients.amount: 1 1/2 sticks unsalted butter, cold and cut into small pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cherries, granulated sugar, and ground cinnamon. Let it sit for about 15 minutes, until the cherries start to release their juice.
Roll out the cold butter and flour mixture into a large rectangle.
Pour the cherry mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Place the rectangular dough on top of the cherry mixture, pressing the edges to seal.
Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.
